decisions.rationale: Referenced by all sub-skills; single source of truth avoids duplication. ~1K file loaded once per session.
decisions.impact: Adds one new file to the skill directory

decisions.decision: Layer 1 and Layer 3 dispatch contracts remain in SKILL.md rather than separate files
alternatives: l1-dispatch.md and l3-dispatch.md as standalone files
decisions.rationale: These are dispatch annotations + summary presentation logic, not standalone sub-skill instructions. Keeping them in SKILL.md avoids unnecessary file proliferation.
decisions.impact: SKILL.md grows slightly, but dispatch contracts are HTML comments

decisions.decision: Subagent summaries not cached to files
alternatives: Write summaries to temp files for crash recovery
decisions.rationale: Summaries are < 3K chars and live in conversation context. On failure, subagent re-dispatch regenerates them.
decisions.impact: No crash recovery for summaries, but subagent re-dispatch is fast
